textByHash.2fb5ec135f6d948b4f8a03ef9845d1409badc040: And who on Gielinor are you?
textByHash.ee28fc7fc3db5f22ff68176eb86100dd4377bc62: I think you already know the answer to that.
textByHash.9b22abadceef48b3f9ae3aeb22aa8233faab91e4: Shaw. Kasonde Shaw. Don't go acting like you haven't been following me for some time now.
textByHash.afa8b091b75998452e8716e711d00166aae4f989: Exactly. Perhaps you took me for a fool, but I was on to you from the start. Considering what we learnt, I knew it was only a matter of time before you showed up.
textByHash.fef9a78d20112a26c20643a7ed03a5733e724cf1: Don't take me for a fool! If you had no interest in the Old Ones' secrets, why would you have followed me to those ruins? And why would you have come here?
textByHash.6aa18fe9581a543a90093ee4d6c7210b0cd0da96: Really? You want me to believe that all of this is a coincidence?
textByHash.6d16e503fbcd299970f4d66e522fef9b6d94d7ce: Hang on... do you hear that?
textByHash.2148fa114c9ab975a3c72d4c3ac4146ba42e7d7a: The Strangled! Did you disturb any tendrils on your way in here?
textByHash.93a5eb379d68a3788f36944e63b9bb2d564cfb5a: They'll be coming. We've got no chance up here. Head down below! Now!
textByHash.bd52e132fba2d245881951d3d8d25f713d82616b: What are you waiting for? They're coming! Quick, head down below!
textByHash.283af1dd72f2240aef535d0dcce83513f14de278: I hear them approaching from the north east!
textByHash.51fd3847fb8733d501ca78dc02bb413b76206c11: To the north east! They are coming!
textByHash.3a5d95fca06ff214bb59ed90362657195fc11a88: Strangled coming in from the north east!
textByHash.811410c307e8eb30d5169e696af4d22c65004b9e: To the north west! They are coming!
textByHash.9ceb803fe7d21733ebe2c835f915e888a3d0194f: Strangled coming in from the north west!
textByHash.86e10802e496dee85ba60182b206853e110c55de: I hear them approaching from the south east!
textByHash.db2fb28331ff327d9227b673f32d8e925fdc033d: To the south east! They are coming!
textByHash.a67bbf20ef116b7ff6dcb3664a14ecc0e80edb0f: Strangled coming in from the south east!
textByHash.a1fad9c7877283921ccbdb0b2f51f6fc9c1f4a28: I hear them approaching from the south west!
textByHash.dc2e069df3d1830935cce9af080a8741ed881f56: To the south west! They are coming!
textByHash.b4ab46bc5ee1f82bdad70d331d05c0232c7263e2: Strangled coming in from the south west!
textByHash.ffd99d9df8e8b7372c0d1b34ade5b2195357e5f9: They seem to be running out of steam! Let's head back up.
textByHash.019eedaf2f331b311809b3aa5206d9bddcd3984e: That's the lot of them. Let's head back up.
textByHash.2305a139cf4fa63567e3b9dfb1fc0156e2ca1c25: That was too close. You nearly got us both killed!
textByHash.f3835b46ee0a6ed672318d0536942b3ec0eae9ef: You really want me to believe that you don't know anything about this place?
textByHash.a56f1e673d4e5e71be82483ae005e41ba98d3f6a: Well I don't have any reason to trust that.
textByHash.7a3e02d7b46eb278a2adc7203b3eca6255c56245: Alright, fine. But I have no desire to see you get us killed, so you'd better wisen up fast.
textByHash.e7df8149e6cd74c617fb5b3fefaf51a9e0a5a4f3: It all starts with the Old Ones. They lived here long before humans came to these lands, and these ruins here were once their home.
textByHash.a43d25508276c97c60c487e51c953032d982f225: They did, and they did so long before House Arceuus even existed. It was their final attempt to overcome their extinction, but they failed.
textByHash.c3df78ca1acd792d9f00c5c33ea8b954d1f1b544: What you see around you is the result of their failure. It's known as the Strangler.
textByHash.0a20b09e5ce8aabae288e66e6fa310596a67a26e: It's some sort of parasite. It was presumably meant to play a role in their transference rituals, but instead it destroyed them. It has remained here ever since.
textByHash.0e4543536034ecc41ae0f8988b70a4ad7da3a043: Exactly. Plenty of unwary fools have fallen victim to the Strangler. If you don't take care, you will share their fate.
textByHash.98658b07ec74a9564a04d817ced4d63fdb08cb66: The trick is to maintain your distance. They're relatively passive unless you get too close, but if you disturb one, the rest will quickly come running.
textByHash.c085bef4f914fa907cab785d783de2776449d073: If you need to fight one, try to do it away from the rest!
textByHash.fa449bee7d5e6054212691dabfcfbe840c69e0f4: And stay off of the tendrils! You'll alert the lot of them to your location! It's like a network.
textByHash.f41b2c82a3159f8baaec289369f2eb11557dac2b: The fact that you're still alive tells me you broke into my home and stole some of the potion I made.
textByHash.16a51c5874f04c7294444ade716480dd7b420ce3: Call it what you want, it's not important now. What is important is that I believe I can make a more powerful potion using ingredients found here.
textByHash.2854a17e055b5395b41fd251bf85c481480b58fe: If all goes well, this potion will provide increased immunity against the Strangler. If either of us are to find what we want here, it will be essential.
textByHash.5c2c200bad39e4dc01c0253ede361da2ba8a3940: As you've no doubt seen, the Strangler infects plant life as well. However, I've come across a small number of plants that seem to have developed immunity.
textByHash.3d188daf7436c3bce7970e610ca9566ddb96ecb2: First, there's a herb growing atop the cliff just north west of the temple. Second, there are some berries in an old camp on the coast to the south west.
textByHash.bbe4f39c99824369bf00bf9b05f49a47d63f80cf: I need to gather some additional ingredients from within the temple. I will meet you back here once I'm done.
textByHash.69efe316ed0c4e6d13ae2862ce2a841c55a3422a: I found the herb growing atop the cliff just north west of the temple. The berries were in an old camp on the coast to the south west.
textByHash.2e500358f41c747202c06485bc89ec206ac12731: Damn it! Damn it! This can't happen! It can't!
textByHash.d85fbe56e185b86af621590712eba8e26cca6b86: It's fine! This doesn't change anything.
textByHash.727bc3ba0cbd376d27f773eec8c927c4fd4e85f4: I was a dead man either way...
textByHash.4251222b1fa52e7395703198a51e056a3ff42f26: Koreps Syndrome. Common among botanists apparently. You'd have thought we'd have put some effort into finding a cure, but I guess no one ever thinks they'll be the unlucky one.
textByHash.76829c4b2a6e1ed03562be4e428cebafb615301e: Don't. Whatever you have to say, I don't want to hear it. Do you know how many times I've heard the word 'sorry'? Do you know how many times people have told me they understand?
textByHash.2c910280fd83d8712c66c43e18093a4c4ee7d9bb: Well they don't. I spent every day working away, telling myself that one day I'd finally be able to live my life, but it was all a lie. That was my life, and it was all so... meaningless!
textByHash.75f6af2b5f6c79ef8cd5138d24496f5fa4883a22: I tried everything. I went to every healer, every mage, every priest.
textByHash.8c288c84d8f03085d155407f2d6775df1084c3e0: I went to House Arceuus, and they turned me away! What gives them the right?!
textByHash.f634e786534891149f5f1ea0ee6cf038a2062a85: So no, this doesn't change anything. The Old Ones are my last hope. I either find their secrets, or...
textByHash.1aa0f45e91267bf0f3f6c36375cb4e5db38665c6: Look, we're wasting time here! There's a ritual site to the west. Presumably it's where the Strangler was unleashed. It's my best hope now, and it may well be where you'll find what you're after as well.
textByHash.9e8fc1bce243235caeb873d820b99d8f126330ff: Take this potion and add those ingredients you gathered to it. It should strengthen your immunity against the Strangler. Now go!
textByHash.3d8e439397e2b3f72c2cc03e7928e253356cf785: We're running out of time! I'm running out of time! Drink that potion. It should strengthen your immunity against the Strangler. Now go!
textByHash.d8265816e4d17e08cab5a3be29105f9d22fdbe74: We're running out of time! I'm running out of time! Get to the ritual site, now!
textByHash.463e3f6535ecfadc670a6dc9cd957e5e731ae27b: We're running out of time! I'm running out of time! Take this potion and add those ingredients you gathered to it. It should strengthen your immunity against the Strangler. Now go!
textByHash.232a344a6692162c9902fddfcd78d4163b0a9176: Did you reach the ritual site? Did you find anything?
textByHash.d0fc8a5d4299e5ab4878f92339b9fe4ea12c0bc8: A key? Maybe it opens these doors... Quick, give it to me!
textByHash.c1251a6c87b09a75ef7a4f7e2d3e5a142f85c6fa: Right, I think I have something, but we need to go quickly.
textByHash.9b38a79efad58ebdd9e962d7604cb793aa906cf9: Back to Kourend of course. You didn't think we'd be able to do this here, did you? I don't have any of the right equipment.
textByHash.35f1b4b2e335ecd5bb4c0dfb907395e51c87300c: Yes, I'm all too aware! That's why we need to go now!
textByHash.52cf7f7370a8c997bca1ab8f72c7425125525e75: That's a risk we're going to have to take. We have no other option!
textByHash.6a2b826b2e40b48914c274fbc89ca1713d45b29f: I haven't come this far to give up now! This is my last hope! If you won't help me, then step aside!
textByHash.d923122b0d41dfe0fd1f35e8f971afbb6d3b7a60: I don't have time for this! I can already feel it inside me, changing me! Step aside... now!
textByHash.5e8a13d5a4dd58fbbe978447d5afacbbd542520f: Then you leave me no choice...
textByHash.573acaf1e532497b375a644c1213794aea35ba7f: No... Not like this... Not when I'm so close...
textByHash.10016ccf2fd8300933ac74a5881d29dea4de0d77: At the ritual site... you didn't find what you we're looking for.
textByHash.4a6104f9cfc84fc8209cb5dd5bcf3cd3b10bd6f2: It wasn't a question. I knew you wouldn't. You didn't find it... because I already had it.
textByHash.779235fbc1df375d656f1995bf3f5d6964a052ce: I had a feeling it was important, that it might have been what you were after, but if I'd given it to you, you wouldn't have helped me.
textByHash.97b99b318258ec5b919276a630c0bbd0b58c4f0b: I couldn't take the risk. You were my last hope...
textByHash.fa27e41a22ce1bf49db81728b6716ece4eeaf603: The medallion. You'll find it in a chest back at my hideout. I hope... I hope it...
textByHash.79e9b1ca89c818e821cce2609866c9c152ce4ed1: Don't you remember how we overcame the infected Stranglewood?
textByHash.08cf09555ed2427e096d138d82484faafcf49f7e: I tried everything. I went to every healer, ever mage, every priest.
